description: Defines the HistoryStore interface for storing and loading history entries, abstracting storage details for unit testing.

classes.name: HistoryStore
classes.description: Interface for persisting and retrieving history entries, facilitating unit testing without Android framework dependencies.

methods.name: load
methods.description: Loads the list of HistoryEntry objects from storage.

methods.name: save
methods.description: Saves the list of HistoryEntry objects to storage.
